name: release_gate_checklist_template
description: Generates a visible checklist RG-01…RG-xx (Evidence/DoD/Security/Ops/Post-deploy/Rollback) and status rules before release.
default_prompt: Use $release_gate_checklist_template when the task matches the "Release Gate Checklist Template" skill.
triggers: Generates a visible checklist RG-01…RG-xx (Evidence/DoD/Security/Ops/Post-deploy/Rollback) and status rules before release
